title: karwinskia mollis
intro: Karwinskia mollis, also known as copal ball or copal, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America, characterized by its small, ball-shaped fruit and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Karwinskia mollis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antifungal and antibacterial activities. Karwinskia mollis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, making it accessible for use in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
